name: mercadolibre-action-policy-plan-report
description: ML product: discover actionable elements, classify risk, generate safe navigation plan. NO clicks. Read-only.

steps.text: ML Action/Policy/Plan: {{actions.count}} items | HighestRisk: {{actions.highestRisk}} | Safe:{{actions.safeCount}} Nav:{{actions.navCount}} Dangerous:{{actions.dangerousCount}} Auth:{{actions.authCount}} Payment:{{actions.paymentCount}} | Blocked: {{navPlan.blockedCount}} | ReqApproval: {{navPlan.requiresApprovalCount}} | Executable: {{navPlan.hasExecutableActions}} | Summary: {{navPlan.summary}}
